required_validation_commands: exact changed-path and canonical hash verification
expected_results: liveness remains true when the database is unavailable
readiness is false on bounded database failure and never calls an external provider
worker heartbeat is explicit and stale heartbeat is degraded
responses and logs contain no secrets, credentials, tokens, signatures, cookies, URLs, or raw provider payloads
metric labels are bounded and operational metrics are internal-only
backup and restore use only loopback PostgreSQL 16 and required disposable prefixes
checksum, schema, row-count, corrupt-backup, wrong-target, restart/reconnect, and cleanup validations pass
no migration, Docker, registry, external network, deployment, or production acceptance occurs
